_comment: User 2026-05-23: previous target Y=200 sent Jake into the sky (above the cabin). Cabin door footprint is at y=396-486; sweet spot for 'walking into the door' is around y=340 — Jake's foot ends just at the door threshold without overshooting. After the move he's hidden so he doesn't pop back when PP re-enters camp_grounds. (No npc-recede support yet; the move + walk_back sprite + cabin BG combine to read as the cabin entry.)
